literal.string: A wrapper for strings used in scala.Predef contexts.
A Scala 2 symbol literal (corresponds to scala.Symbol).
The root of the Scalameta tree hierarchy. Each arm names a major AST category.

metadata.description: A Scala syntax model for Hydra, anchored on Scalameta (https://scalameta.org). Departs from Scalameta where Hydra's needs differ: Term is renamed to Data, the FunctionType/FunctionData wrappers are flattened, and arms Hydra never emits (xml literals, quasiquote/macro forms) are omitted.
